title: Classic Char Grilled Mediterranean Lamb Tagine
description: A funky and quick-fix Mediterranean dish featuring chopped chive and robata-grilled lamb, cooked in a ceramic tagine, this recipe is perfect for a low-glycemic friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, if using, and season with salt, black pepper, and dried oregano.
Brush the lamb with olive oil and grill for 5 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Transfer the lamb to a ceramic tagine and add the garlic, lemon juice, chopped chive, and canned diced tomatoes.
Cover the tagine with a lid and simmer over low heat for 10 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with additional chopped chive if desired.
Let the dish rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with a side of low-glycemic friendly vegetables, such as roasted broccoli or grilled asparagus.
